utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists physical and mental plans with specific monthly costs and a total health cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home contents plan and several relevant add-ons with individual costs and a total property cost. Fully specified (includes home/contents and costs).
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists base plan and add-ons with costs and a total travel cost. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan states none explicitly beyond categorized add-ons. While no extra services are added, the field is addressed; since it asks for any, indicating none is acceptable.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and meet the detail requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each item named in the final coverage plan and matched it to the closest exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. Items present in the plan: LifeFirst Standard Physical Plan maps to primary_health_coverage -> physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan. LifeFirst Standard Mental Plan maps to primary_health_coverage -> mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan. EliteHome Premium Coverage (for Photography Equipment & Home Content) matches property_protection -> home_content -> EliteHome Premium Coverage. Home Office Protection (Add-on) matches property_enhancement_services -> Home Office Protection. Technology Protection (Add-on) matches property_enhancement_services -> Technology Protection. PrimeTravel Premium Plan matches mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan. Adventure Travel Coverage (Add-on) matches travel_enhancement_services -> Adventure Travel Coverage. Premium Medical Network (Add-on) matches travel_enhancement_services -> Premium Medical Network. The 'Existing Freelancer Insurance Package' for professional liability has no corresponding ground-truth entry, so it is excluded.
